layman_headline: The crypto market is fearful and most coins look weak — patience is the play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is sitting in 'Fear' territory with a score of 28 out of 100, and Bitcoin dominance at 56.5% means money is flowing away from smaller coins into Bitcoin. Almost every swing candidate has a bearish chart structure — prices are below their key moving averages and trending down. While a few coins like TRUMP and BONK are deeply oversold, their charts are ugly with no signs of a bottom forming yet. The safest approach right now is to wait for clearer reversal signals before committing capital.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. Set price alerts for ETH at $1,800 (potential buy zone) and watch for the Fear & Greed index to dip below 20 for a contrarian entry. Don't chase anything in this environment.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling risk/reward setup right now. TRUMP has the deepest oversold RSI at 22 (historically strong for bounces per our credibility data), but its chart bias is -0.70 with a terrible 1:1 risk/reward ratio and no visible support structure. BONK at RSI 31 has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — classic capitulation that could continue. LDO has the best chart (bias +0.85, Three White Soldiers), but RSI at 59 and a poor 0.38x risk/reward after a 52% 5-day run makes it a chase. ETH is the best-positioned for a future entry near $1,800 support, where risk/reward improves meaningfully. With BTC dominance at 56.5% and Fear at 28, alts remain under pressure. I'm holding cash and waiting for a cleaner setup.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to squeeze altcoin valuations — could worsen before improving
Fear & Greed at 28 has been flat around 25-28 for a week — could break lower into extreme fear triggering more selling
No swing candidate has a bullish MACD cross or is above its SMA20/50 with confirmed reversal — catching falling knives is the primary risk
watch_list: ETH price action near $1,800 support — a hammer or morning star candle there with rising volume would be actionable
TRUMP RSI — if it drops to 15-18 range with a bullish divergence on MACD, that's a high-probability mean-reversion trade
Fear & Greed index — a spike below 15 (extreme fear) often marks local bottoms and would be the contrarian entry signal
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven regime with BTC dominance at 56.5%, signaling capital rotation away from altcoins. BTC itself is flat near $64,500, and without a clear directional catalyst, altcoins are bleeding — not an environment for aggressive swing entries.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance create a hostile environment for alt swing trades — capital preservation mode until reversal signals emerge.

key_signals.description: RSI signals (80% historical win rate) show TRUMP at 22 and BONK at 31 are oversold, but chart structures haven't confirmed reversals — waiting for alignment between RSI and price action.
Fear & Greed at 28 with a flat weekly trend around 25-28 suggests the market hasn't capitulated enough for a high-conviction contrarian entry.
No strong bullish catalyst in current news — GENIUS Act regulatory delays and Tether's USDT countdown add uncertainty rather than momentum to crypto markets.
ETH derivatives reset narrative suggests leveraged positions are getting flushed, which could set the stage for a cleaner entry on ETH once the reset completes.
LDO's Three White Soldiers is the only bullish chart pattern across all candidates, but its 0.38x risk/reward after a 52% 5-day run makes it a poor entry at current levels.
